notes: As reported, doesn't connect to 2k Servers. Game runs pretty well on my pc otherwise.
title: NBA 2K19

notes: Game launches but can't connect to EA servers so you can only play offline. Not sure about anyone else but for me the announcer / commentary audio was missing.
title: NBA 2K19

notes:
Cannot connect to 2k servers. Can be played offline. To play offline, I had symlink some library to proton's file with command " ln -s /usr/lib/_/libgnutls.so.30 .steam/steam/steamapps/common/Proton 3.7/libgnutls.26     
"

After playing 10-15 sound start flickering but I think it is performance related issues due to old hardware. 

Some sounds are lacking. 

Graphics performans is good.
title: NBA 2K19

notes: I echo the other comments on here (no online, performance seems okay) but I would add that there are gamepad issues, wether I'm using a playstation 3 controller or a wired xbox controller sometimes the game will detect the lt button (on the xbox gamepad) as being pressed on.

title: NBA 2K19

notes:
Runs great, I can play MyCareer and Multiplayer with friends. Only minor graphical glitches like slight flickering in menus and missing thighs during some animations.
Only had it crash once but it was at the same time as my friend on windows crashed so I doubt it was related to the OS. Runs well even on Ultra.
